system.description: A centuries-old vampire working as a paranormal investigator. Demonstrates multiple power implementations and high Cool pool. Vulnerable to sunlight, fire, and stakes through the heart.

power.name: Shapeshifting
power.description: Transform into mist, a bat, or wolf form. Regain control each turn.

characteristics.text: Must feed on blood to recover from injury
Weaknesses: sunlight, fire, running water, holy symbols

secondaryPower.name: Mind Control
secondaryPower.description: Influence a target's thoughts and commands. Dominate weaker wills.
